ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college_university" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary team colors */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's assistant coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player signing the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team offering the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., trade, free agency, rookie deal) */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms of the contract (e.g., 4 years, $44M) */,
  "salary_per_year" TEXT /* Salary per year of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "guaranteed_amount" TEXT /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "bonus" TEXT /* Signing bonus or performance bonus */,
  "performance_clauses" TEXT /* Performance clauses in the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, terminated, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., signing, trade, release) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "from_team" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is moving from */,
  "to_team" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is moving to */,
  "transaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transaction */,
  "transaction_value" TEXT /* Monetary value of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_team FOREIGN KEY ("from_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_team FOREIGN KEY ("to_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the league belongs to */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the league's logo */,
  "league_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary league colors */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league's commissioner */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league's season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league's season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Short abbreviation of the position */,
  "position_group" TEXT /* Position group (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)
